Viloeta Florika,for Respondent/Plaintiff
Kaylen Kadotani, ESQ.,Hanson Bridgett, 415-995-5136 for Appellant/Respondent, Golden Gate Bridge Highway & Transport District

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Viloet Florika testifies on behalf of herself, Respondent/Plaintiff,
Zoe Salter, testifies on behalf of the respondent

Respondent/Plaintiff's group exhibit No. 1, is identified and retained .

Kaylen Kadotani, argues on behalf of the appellant/defendant
Appellant/Defendant's group exhibit A (Exhibit F from Brief)is identified and retained

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling
